title: CyberSky
description: A cyberpunk anime-themed space sky, depicting the surface of the Moon and a view of Earth in the distance.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b24537b1bfc63c3fb2b717f0de1e918f3dc07222.jpeg)

**CyberSky** is a sky overlay designed to be layered on top of the default sky or combined with any texture pack.

Inspired by a futuristic cyberpunk anime atmosphere, it recreates a space environment where the ground appears as the Moon while Earth dominates the horizon.

The overlay enhances immersion without modifying blocks or gameplay visuals, allowing it to work with almost any pack.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
